title: Centrosolenia coccinea
taxonomy: Centrosolenia coccinea is classified within the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. It belongs to the tribe Heliantheae and is a member of the genus Centrosolenia. This plant is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. As a member of the Asteraceae family, Centrosolenia coccinea is a flowering plant that produces showy, long-lasting blooms. The specific classification of Centrosolenia coccinea provides valuable information about its evolutionary relationships and botanical characteristics.
